asset.title: Noderoom Live Collab V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: A well-structured narrated explainer demonstrating multiplayer AI collaboration on a shared spreadsheet, highlighting conflict resolution and versioning.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows clear UI steps of a human and agent editing the same spreadsheet cell.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the progression from simple edits to conflict handling and final merge.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed interface, though some panels are crowded.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with Noderoom's core concepts of shared sheets, agents, and transaction traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Features actual UI execution, code logic, and a clear architectural diagram.

legibility.evidence: Main captions are clear, but some spreadsheet cells and code lines are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for engineering teams building collaborative AI systems.

productionHonesty.evidence: Openly discusses the failure modes of naive agent writes and proposes a robust solution.

observedEvidence: Multiplayer spreadsheet UI with active cursors
Convex code snippet for cell editing lock logic
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Noderoom Live Collab: Resolving edit conflicts between humans and AI agents in a shared multiplayer workspace.
